data.name: Sex Chess
data.detailed_description:
Sex, Please!


關於此遊戲

據說撒旦是地獄的合法統治者，但即使在這裡，他也必須擊退惱人的“用大劍的善良力量”，這些力量想要將所有罪人從他的地下地牢中解放出來。

扮演地獄般的 BDSM 實踐者、魔鬼最重要的追隨者，並在棋盤上的六回合決鬥中粉碎光明勢力的領袖。用你的智慧和狡猾來向無恥的解放者表明他們的立場。

特徵：
- 超過60個性愛場景；
- 熱座模式；
- 故事模式;
- 獨特的故事；
- 如果您是國際象棋新手，沒問題！使用強大的魔法來壓制你的對手！
- 你不需要體力來獲勝，但你需要聰明和精於算計。不要讓對手的俏皮言論迷惑你；
- 活棋子。光之生物和罪人一樣具有誘惑力。你的國際象棋比賽將變成夢幻般、令人興奮的藝術派對；
- 魔法能力。如果魔鬼不是總是有詭計的話，他就不會被稱為這個名字。一系列新規則會讓你比對手更有優勢，但前提是她注意到他被欺騙了；
- 在線多人遊戲！叫上你的朋友一起在棋盤上享受一些硬核動作吧！

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.0 Ghz (2 Core)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GeForce GTX 260 / Radeon HD 4850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible
  • 備註: You may need to update the driver for your video card and sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.33 Ghz (4 Core)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GeForce GTX 670 / AMD Radeon HD 7990
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible
  • 備註: You may need to update the driver for your video card and sound card

categories.description: 共享 / 分割螢幕玩家對戰

data.name: Sex Chess
data.detailed_description:
Sex, Please!


About the Game



It is said that the Satan is the rightful Ruler of Hell, but even here he will have to fend off the annoying "forces of Good with BIG swords" that want to free all of the sinners from his underground dungeon.



Take on the role of a hellish BDSM practitioner, the Devil's most important henchman, and crush the leader of the Light Forces in a six round duel on the chessboard. Use your intellect and cunning to show the brazen liberators their place.



Features:
- More than 60 sex scenes;
- Hotseat mode;
- Story mode;
- Unique story;
- If you are new to chess, no problem! Use powerful magic to dominate your opponent!
- You don't need physical strength to win, but you'll need to be smart and calculating. Don't let the witty remarks of your opponent confuse you;
- Live chess pieces. The creatures of Light are as alluring as the hos sinners. Your chess matches will turn into phantasmagoric, mind-blowing art house parties;
- Magical abilities. The Devil wouldn't be called that if he didn't always have a trick up his sleeve. A bunch of new rules will give you an advantage over your opponent, but only before she notices he's being deceived;
- Online Multiplayer! Call your friends to enjoy some hardcore action on the chess board together!

data.short_description: Hell is about to get invaded and the sinners trapped inside are about to be freed. But the clueless liberators had no idea how cunning the Devil is. This time, the war between Light and Darkness will be waged not on the battlefield, but on a chess board.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • Processor: 3.0 Ghz (2 Core)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVidia GeForce GTX 260 / Radeon HD 4850
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible
  • Additional Notes: You may need to update the driver for your video card and sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • Processor: 3.33 Ghz (4 Core)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVidia GeForce GTX 670 / AMD Radeon HD 7990
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible
  • Additional Notes: You may need to update the driver for your video card and sound card
